query: SELECT regiao, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CAST(valor AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_valor FROM contas_receber WHERE regiao IS NOT NULL AND regiao != '' GROUP BY regiao ORDER BY total_valor DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4YM1DW8PNUmYgdV.dec729061751 --database CUP5Wn668FHrJUAyFxZ7sB --execute SELECT regiao, COUNT(*) as qtd, SUM(CAST(valor AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_valor FROM contas_receber WHERE regiao IS NOT NULL AND regiao != '' GROUP BY regiao ORDER BY total_valor DESC LIMIT 20;
